tagline: Draw it · Color it · Love it 🌈
placeholder: Draw anything… a dragon, a castle ✨
saveFailed: Couldn't save — please allow photo access and try again
emptyHint: Pick a card, choose Today's Word, or type your own — we'll draw it! 🎨
coloringHint: 👆 Tap a color below, then tap any numbered region to fill it!
helpLine1: ✏️ Type anything to draw — a cat, a dragon, a rocket ship…
helpLine2: 🎨 Tap Draw! and AI creates a coloring page just for you
helpLine3: 🔢 Tap a numbered area, then tap a color to fill it
helpLine4: 🖨️ Print or save your masterpiece when you're done!
challengeHint: 🏆 Challenge a friend — share this picture and race to finish first!
dailyInfoBody: Every day everyone gets the same word to color. Race your friends!
galleryEmpty:
No saved drawings yet
Draw something! 🎨
subscribeSubtitle: Unlimited drawings · All difficulties · HD quality
freeLimitReached:
You've used all {limit} free drawings today 🎨
Come back tomorrow, or go Plus for unlimited!
contentSafetyError: Please choose a fun topic for kids — animals, vehicles, fantasy creatures, food…
networkError: Connection error — please check your network and try again
generationError: The drawing service is busy right now — please try again in a moment! 🎨
backConfirmBody: Your coloring progress will be lost.
challengeText: Challenge: Color {subject} and see who finishes first! 🏆
consentBody: We use analytics to improve Lalabuba. No personal data is collected from children.
goFreeBody: Color any area with any color! Your coloring stays. 🎉
eyedropperHint: Tap anywhere on screen to pick that color
tipPromptBody: Type anything you want to color — an animal, a car, a castle…
tipDrawBody: Tap Draw! and we'll turn your idea into a coloring page.
tipCanvasBody: Tap an area with a number and use that color. Areas with no number you can fill with ANY color you like!
tipColorsBody: Tap a color here first, then tap an area to fill it.
tipModesBody: Switch between Tap, Paint, Pencil and Eraser — and Undo your last fill.
tipSaveBody: Save your art to the gallery, print it, or share it with family.
dailyLimitBody: You've made lots of drawings today! Come back tomorrow for more coloring fun. 🎨
